# programs.termite

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.termite`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.termite.allowBold` | `null or boolean` | Allow the output of bold characters when the bold escape sequence appears. |
| `programs.termite.audibleBell` | `null or boolean` | Have the terminal beep on the terminal bell. |
| `programs.termite.backgroundColor` | `null or string` | Background color value. |
| `programs.termite.browser` | `null or string` | Set the default browser for opening links. If its not set, $BROWSER is read. If that's not set, url hints will be disabled. |
| `programs.termite.clickableUrl` | `null or boolean` | Auto-detected URLs can be clicked on to open them in your browser. Only enabled if a browser is configured or detected. |
| `programs.termite.colorsExtra` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra colors options that should be added to [colors] section. |
| `programs.termite.cursorBlink` | `null or one of "system", "on", "off"` | Specify the how the terminal's cursor should behave. Accepts system to respect the gtk global configuration, on and off to explicitly enable or disable them. |
| `programs.termite.cursorColor` | `null or string` | Cursor color value. |
| `programs.termite.cursorForegroundColor` | `null or string` | Cursor foreground color value. |
| `programs.termite.cursorShape` | `null or one of "block", "underline", "ibeam"` | Specify how the cursor should look. Accepts block, ibeam and underline. |
| `programs.termite.dynamicTitle` | `null or boolean` | Settings dynamic title allows the terminal and the shell to update the terminal's title. |
| `programs.termite.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Termite VTE-based terminal. |
| `programs.termite.enableVteIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Shell VTE integration. |
| `programs.termite.filterUnmatchedUrls` | `null or boolean` | Whether to hide url hints not matching input in url hints mode. |
| `programs.termite.font` | `null or string` | The font description for the terminal's font. |
| `programs.termite.foregroundBoldColor` | `null or string` | Foreground bold color value. |
| `programs.termite.foregroundColor` | `null or string` | Foreground color value. |
| `programs.termite.fullscreen` | `null or boolean` | Enables entering fullscreen mode by pressing F11. |
| `programs.termite.geometry` | `null or string` | The default window geometry for new terminal windows. |
| `programs.termite.highlightColor` | `null or string` | highlight color value. |
| `programs.termite.hintsActiveBackgroundColor` | `null or string` | Hints active background color value. |
| `programs.termite.hintsActiveForegroundColor` | `null or string` | Hints active foreground color value. |
| `programs.termite.hintsBackgroundColor` | `null or string` | Hints background color value. |
| `programs.termite.hintsBorderColor` | `null or string` | Hints border color value. |
| `programs.termite.hintsBorderWidth` | `null or string` | Hints border width. |
| `programs.termite.hintsExtra` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra hints options that should be added to [hints] section. |
| `programs.termite.hintsFont` | `null or string` | The font description for the hints font. |
| `programs.termite.hintsForegroundColor` | `null or string` | Hints foreground color value. |
| `programs.termite.hintsPadding` | `null or signed integer` | Hints padding. |
| `programs.termite.hintsRoundness` | `null or string` | Hints roundness. |
| `programs.termite.iconName` | `null or string` | The name of the icon to be used for the terminal process. |
| `programs.termite.modifyOtherKeys` | `null or boolean` | Emit escape sequences for extra keys, like the modifyOtherKeys resource for {manpage}`xterm(1)`. |
| `programs.termite.mouseAutohide` | `null or boolean` | Automatically hide the mouse pointer when you start typing. |
| `programs.termite.optionsExtra` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra options that should be added to [options] section. |
| `programs.termite.package` | `null or package` | The termite package to use. |
| `programs.termite.scrollOnKeystroke` | `null or boolean` | Scroll to the bottom automatically when a key is pressed. |
| `programs.termite.scrollOnOutput` | `null or boolean` | Scroll to the bottom when the shell generates output. |
| `programs.termite.scrollbackLines` | `null or signed integer` | Set the number of lines to limit the terminal's scrollback. |
| `programs.termite.scrollbar` | `null or one of "off", "left", "right"` | Scrollbar position. |
| `programs.termite.searchWrap` | `null or boolean` | Search from top again when you hit the bottom. |
| `programs.termite.sizeHints` | `null or boolean` | Enable size hints. Locks the terminal resizing to increments of the terminal's cell size. Requires a window manager that respects scroll hints. |
| `programs.termite.urgentOnBell` | `null or boolean` | Sets the window as urgent on the terminal bell. |
